question_text: Which of the following statements is/are TRUE?

options.A: Every subset of a recursively enumerable language is recursive.
options.B: If a language L and its complement L are both recursively enumerable, then L must
options.C: Complement of a context-free language must be recursive.
options.D: If L1 and L2 are regular, then L1 ∩ L2 must be deterministic context-free.
